description: Focuses on lactation physiology across mammalian species. Structure and function of mammary glands; hormonal control of mammary development and lactation; cellular mechanisms of milk synthesis; the chemistry of milk synthesis; mastitis and other abnormalities of mammary functions.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (BIOCHEM 301,501, BMOLCHEM 314, or concurrent enrollment) and (ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY  101and102),ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY/​BOTANY  151, or (BIOCORE 382,383, and384), or graduate/professional standing
